problem id: 032fc96f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) XOR SHL(1)

examples:
  11010011 -> 11101001
  10100000 -> 11000010
  01110110 -> 00110101
  00001000 -> 00110000
  00001011 -> 00111010
  01010011 -> 11101011
  01011110 -> 11000101
  00100110 -> 11010100
  01010100 -> 11111001

query: 00010101
predicted answer: 01111110
